cycleContext.note: June 3 scan (24-hour window since June 2). Key signals: (1) Ebola escalation — DRC 381/64, Uganda 19/2, WHO+Africa CDC $518M plan; (2) Oracle June 15 WARN Act deadline — 13 days from June 2, now 12 days — final phase; (3) Iran: 600+ YTD executions, internet shutdown lifted May 26 after 88 days; (4) Russia June 2 Kyiv attack: 22 civilians killed; (5) Bolivia workers insurrection week 6; (6) UK CMA June 3 world-first Google AI publisher ruling; (7) US health insurer cartel: Arizona AG sued 8 insurers + MultiPlan June 1; (8) MA AG sued UnitedHealth $100M Medicaid fraud May 29; (9) Sudan: famine now confirmed in 2 new Darfur areas; (10) EU Returns Regulation force June 12; (11) Afghanistan UNSC UNAMA mandate 17-June deadline; (12) Anthropic June 5 global AI pause proposal.

pendingWatchesFromPriorCycles.status: CRITICAL: June 15 is final deadline — now 12 days away. Workers denied better terms. Assessment required before June 15.
ESCALATING: DRC 381/64; Uganda 19 cases including Kampala. WHO+Africa CDC $518M plan. PHEIC active. No vaccine.
ONGOING: 600+ YTD; 39+ political. Internet shutdown lifted May 26. Arman Marefati at imminent risk.

pendingWatchesFromPriorCycles.signal: DC Circuit divided on Pentagon appeal
pendingWatchesFromPriorCycles.status: UPDATED: DC Circuit oral arguments heard. Judge Henderson: spectacular overreach. June 5: Anthropic calls for global AI pause.
ESCALATING: Now in 6th week. Union leaders arrested on terrorism charges. Oil field occupation brutally repressed.
IN PROGRESS: Sixteenth Amendment introduced May 20. Police banned Pride events 3 times despite Supreme Court appeals.
ONGOING: 145 disappeared. Gujarat 10,000+ demolitions. New detention centre policy post-BJP West Bengal win.

pendingWatchesFromPriorCycles.signal: EU migration deal; deportations to Afghanistan/Syria
pendingWatchesFromPriorCycles.status: ACTIVE: Returns Regulation force June 12. Germany rejected internal border control removal June 4.

newMaterialEventsInWindow: UK CMA June 3 world-first ruling — Google ordered to give publishers AI Overviews opt-out; no retaliation; attribution required
Russia June 2 massive attack on Kyiv: 22 civilians killed including children; Putin rejected Zelenskyy direct-talks
WHO+Africa CDC $518M Ebola response plan announced June 5; DRC 381/64; Uganda 19/2
Anthropic June 5: called for globally coordinated pause/slowdown on frontier AI development
Bolivia workers insurrection week 6: union leaders arrested on terrorism charges June 6
EU Returns Regulation enters force June 12 — safe-third-country deportation, return hubs, extended detention
Arizona AG June 1 multi-insurer price-fixing cartel lawsuit: 8 insurers + MultiPlan/Claritev named
Massachusetts AG sued UnitedHealthcare May 29 for $100M MassHealth fraud (upcoding seniors)
Norway SAS cabin crew to strike June 23 if mediation fails
Anthropic DC Circuit: judge Henderson called Pentagon blacklisting spectacular overreach

prioritizedEntities.name: Iran
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: June 2026 execution surge: 600+ YTD, 39+ political post-protest executions. 88-day internet shutdown restored May 26. Children facing death penalty. Arman Marefati at imminent risk.

prioritizedEntities.name: Oracle Corporation
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: June 15 final WARN Act deadline: 30,000 workers sign-release-or-forfeit. WARN pay absorbed into severance. Workers denied better terms. WARN Act challenges in WA and MO.

prioritizedEntities.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: Ebola Bundibugyo 381 cases/64 deaths. WHO+Africa CDC $518M plan. PHEIC active. No vaccine. 45% contact tracing. 26.5M concurrent acute hunger.

prioritizedEntities.name: UnitedHealth Group
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: MA AG $100M Medicaid fraud suit. DOJ civil+criminal Medicare Advantage probe. Arizona price-fixing cartel suit. AI denial class action. Triple damages possible.

prioritizedEntities.name: Russia
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: June 2 attack on Kyiv: 22 civilians killed including children. Putin rejected direct talks June 6. Ukraine lost 70% electricity generation. Drone casualty surge +120%.

prioritizedEntities.name: Sudan
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: 33.7M requiring assistance (highest globally). 19.5M acutely food insecure. Famine confirmed. Only 16.2% funded. Year 3 of civil war. 825,000 children SAM.

prioritizedEntities.name: xAI / Grok
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: Pentagon $200M classified access. Sen. Warren safety demands. Documented harmful outputs (murder advice, CSAM, antisemitic). DoD Responsible AI chief departed. SE Asia bans holding.

prioritizedEntities.name: Myanmar
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: Junta 21% territory; 5.2M displaced; 15,000+ killed 2025. Continued airstrikes on civilians. 550+ attacks post-earthquake ceasefire. ICC arrest warrant sought.

prioritizedEntities.name: CVS Health
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: $250M 340B spread-pricing lawsuits filed May 21 (Mount Sinai, U-Kansas, U-Michigan). RICO triple damages sought. Arizona AG price-fixing cartel suit names CVS/Aetna.

prioritizedEntities.name: India
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: 1,500+ Bengali Muslims expelled; some Indian citizens. 40+ thrown into sea. 145 disappeared. 10,000+ Gujarat demolitions against SC ruling. New detention centre policy post-BJP West Bengal win.

prioritizedEntities.name: Palestine
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: Ceasefire fragile: 700+ Palestinians killed since Oct. 77% acutely food insecure. Crossings closed Feb-Mar. ICJ: aid blockage weapon of war. 37 NGO licences revoked. 1.8M displaced.

prioritizedEntities.name: South Sudan
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: 7.8M (56%) acutely food insecure. 73,300 catastrophic Phase 5 (up 160%). Four counties at famine risk. 2.1M children under-5 at acute malnutrition risk.

prioritizedEntities.name: Afghanistan
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: UNSC UNAMA mandate extended (June 17 deadline). Taliban Decrees No.12 (domestic violence authorised) and No.18 (no minimum marriage age). Women banned from UN offices since Sep 2025. Health system near catastrophe.

prioritizedEntities.name: Bolivia
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: 6-week workers insurrection. 100+ blockade points. Union leaders arrested on terrorism charges. Oil field occupation repressed. Demand: President Paz resignation.

prioritizedEntities.name: Alphabet/Google
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: UK CMA June 3 world-first ruling: Google must give publishers AI Overviews opt-out, attribution, no penalty for opt-out. 9-month compliance. DOJ antitrust ongoing.

sectorAlerts.description: DRC/Uganda Ebola: 381 cases/64 deaths as of June 5. WHO+Africa CDC $518M plan announced. PHEIC active. No vaccine. Uganda now 19 cases including Kampala. 45% contact trace completion only.
Iran: 600+ executions YTD; 39+ political. 88-day internet shutdown. Children among those facing death penalty post-January protests. Arman Marefati at imminent risk.
Oracle June 15 deadline: 30,000 workers sign-release-or-forfeit severance. WARN pay absorbed into severance for newer employees. Active WARN Act investigations WA and MO.
52.8M facing acute food insecurity June-August 2026. Nigeria Borno at catastrophic Phase 5 first time in decade. 3.5M besieged in Mali/Burkina/Niger. WFP severely underfunded.
sectorAlerts.entities_potentially_affected: nigeria, mali, niger, chad, burkina-faso, cameroon, central-african-republic

sectorAlerts.description: EU AI Act GPAI model enforcement active August 2, 2026 — now ~60 days. 25 organizations signed GPAI Code of Practice. Meta and xAI partial/no signatories. High-risk deadline extended to 2027/2028.
sectorAlerts.entities_potentially_affected: openai, anthropic, alphabet-google, meta-ai, xai-grok, cohere, mistral-ai

sectorAlerts.description: Arizona AG June 1 lawsuit: MultiPlan/Claritev + 8 major insurers (UnitedHealth, Elevance, Cigna, CVS/Aetna, Humana, Molina, Centene, HCSC) alleged price-fixing cartel using shared algorithm to suppress out-of-network payments.
UK CMA June 3 world-first order: Google must give publishers opt-out from AI Overviews, AI Mode, Gemini training. No penalising opt-outs. Attribution required. 9-month implementation window.
EU Returns Regulation enters force June 12 — safe-third-country fast-track, return hubs outside EU, extended detention. Germany rejected internal border control removal request June 4.
sectorAlerts.entities_potentially_affected: germany, austria, netherlands, denmark, greece, sweden, france, spain, italy
